creator: assar@sics.se
text:
The `nm' binary included is from GNU binutils.  Only the (deficient)
man-page for this program is installed and not the more complete info
documentation.

Fix: 

add the texinfo documentation from binutils
How-To-Repeat: 
info nm (and you will get the manpage).  look for binutils or nm in
the info menu.  fail.
